title: Somsi's excalibur swords
description: Custom swords based on ANARCHIA.GG Excalibur's texture
body:
Custom swords from anarchia.gg (based on the texture)![excalibur](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8de5a6cfb46a65bdcd605401b822d9247058fb08.png) i know some people will enjoy this pack so thats why i made that. 






i love how it turned out. Hope u like it and use it. Heavy inspiration of excalibur texture!
